title: 呈现原则 / Presenting
point: 清晰、客户能懂;披露假设/风险/费用/替代方案。 / Clear; disclose assumptions/risks/fees/alternatives.
keyfacts: 不片面强调收益 / No one-sided returns
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Presentation of Analysis and Solutions to Clients

title: 客户决定 / Client decides
point: 确保理解后由客户自主决定,不施压;留存文件。 / Ensure understanding; client decides; keep records.
keyfacts: 建议书备查 / Keep the advice document
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Presentation of Analysis and Solutions to Clients
